---
title: "The Method Layer"
subtitle: "The procedure your AI runs"
---

*Draft pending — placeholder for the gate-sequence rebuild (the companion skill file).*

**Planned:** the full procedure plus the five gate stop-conditions, the gather-checklist, reference code, and decision templates — derived from the toolkit and the gates. Dense, precise, complete; optimized for an AI to execute, not for a human to read.
